subject: Project pulse: rollout execution in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-4577
body: Following yesterday's call, the rollout effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Prepare a fallback plan if integration testing slips beyond schedule. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Marie Curie. Reference initiative INIT-4577. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, ops.
